name: Crypto Price Tracker
description: Next.js dashboard pulling live prices from CoinGecko API. Server-side rendering, 60-second auto-refresh, portfolio watchlist saved to localStorage, and sparkline price charts.

name: .NET 8 Clean Architecture Starter
description: Production-ready REST API template using .NET 8, Clean Architecture, Dapper, and MSSQL. Includes JWT authentication, role-based access control, global exception handling, and Swagger documentation with versioning.

name: EDI X12 / EDIFACT Parser CLI
description: A .NET console tool that parses EDI X12 and EDIFACT messages into strongly-typed C# objects and outputs JSON or CSV. Handles 810, 856, 997 transaction sets — built from real logistics integration experience.

name: ERC-20 Token + Hardhat Boilerplate
description: Solidity ERC-20 token with UUPS upgradeable proxy pattern, Hardhat test suite, and a Next.js + viem frontend to mint, transfer, and check balances. Deployed to Sepolia testnet.

name: Healthcare API Integration SDK
description: A .NET SDK wrapping common healthcare REST APIs (appointment booking, prescription lookup, doctor search). Includes retry policies with Polly, mock server for testing, and full NuGet package setup.

name: MoneyGain
description: This project is related to money and how to make money
